title: [Feature]: how to install podman 3 on fedora 36/37
body:
### Feature request description

how to install podman 3 on fedora 36/37

### Suggest potential solution

no rpm package of podman3 on fedora 36/37，how to install podman 3 on fedora 36/37

### Have you considered any alternatives?

no rpm package of podman3 on fedora 36/37，how to install podman 3 on fedora 36/37

### Additional context

no rpm package of podman3 on fedora 36/37，how to install podman 3 on fedora 36/37

comments.body: We only support the latest podman package, there is no podman 3 package.  You should just install podman, which will get you a version of podman-4.*
